name: io.github.comind-pro/comind-mcp
title: ComindMCP Gateway
description: Self-hosted MCP gateway: aggregate MCP servers & APIs, compose & curate tools, expose virtual MCP endpoints to agents.

environmentVariables.name: DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Store selector. 'file:/data/comind' = embedded Postgres (PGlite, zero-infra, mount /data); 'postgres://…' = external Postgres for multi-instance.

environmentVariables.name: SERVER_ENV
environmentVariables.description: Deployment environment. Use 'dev' to allow insecure default secrets; any other value requires VAULT_KEY and JWT_SECRET.

environmentVariables.name: VAULT_KEY
environmentVariables.description: base64-encoded 32-byte AES-256-GCM key for the secrets vault. Required when SERVER_ENV is not 'dev'.

environmentVariables.name: JWT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: HMAC secret for signing user session JWTs. Required when SERVER_ENV is not 'dev'.

environmentVariables.name: PUBLIC_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Externally reachable base URL (OAuth issuer / endpoint base), e.g. https://mcp.comind.pro.

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP port the gateway listens on.
